rulings.Case Title: ALAN BARTHOLOMEW VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 22, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Motion for Summary Judgment is granted. Defendant shifts the burden of proof. No evidence that plaintiff exposed to asbestos containing products supplied by defendant. Objections to Rogan and Ay declarations sustained, declarations stricken. =(302CWW/VC)

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 22, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANT LOUIS ROESCH'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Granted. No opposition filed. =(302CWW)

rulings.Case Title: FRANCISCO VELASGUEZ VS. EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY SERVICES OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 22, 2009, line 6, DEFENDANT EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY SERVICES OF SAN FRANCISCO, and City and County of San Francisco's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for Summary Judgment is denied as to both Defendants Episcopal Community Services and CCSF. Triable issue of fact raised whether defendant had actual notice of impending assault and breached its minimally burdensome duty to attempt to stop the assault. Defendants fail to demonstrate that each defendant should be treatd differently given CCSF's dominant role with ECS. =(302CWW/PB)

rulings.Case Title: JON SIEGAL VS. SOLIDUS NETWORKS INC A CORPORATION DOING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 22, 2009, line 12, DEFENDANT SOLIDUS NETWORKS, INC.'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is denied. Defendant fails to show that plaintiff's claims are preempted by the NLRA. =(302CWW/JW)
